items.name_en: 🔥 New Glossy Calfskin 💥 Puzzle Fold Cropped handbag plays with geometric shapes again ⭐️ Inspired by the geometric lines of the classic handbag series, reinterpreted with inlays full of geometric architectural beauty, can be folded completely, a good companion for travel. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create soft and lightweight handbags, paired with low-key and elegant brand logos. This cropped version is made of glossy Nappa cowhide. 🌹 This continues the geometric aesthetics of the Puzzle series 🌼 Inspired by origami bags, allowing this Puzzle Fold Cropped to switch freely between 3D and flat 🌺 The leather is very fine. The Puzzle Fold handbag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series 👛 This version is made of soft glossy cowhide 🔥 Handle length 29CM Size: 39CM~12.3CM~12.5CM

items.name_en: 🔥 New Small Nappa Leather Puzzle Handbag💥Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines💋This small version is made of Nappa leather🍉The square mosaic pattern is inspired by🌻Josef Albers' "Homage to the Square" series👑This bag is a work from the LOEWE x Josef and Anni Albers series💄"Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody or carried by hand"Removable and adjustable shoulder strap'Zipper closure💝Calfskin zipper head'One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Fabric lining*Anagram embossed, LOEWE silver hot stamping and Josef💫Albers signature🌺
items.name_cn:

Size: 24~16.5~10.5CM
Model: 9106
Color: Black/White

items.name_en: 🔥 New Version Geometric Bag Small Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Original Imported Nappa Calfskin 💥 Outlined by unique geometric lines, the rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the handbag a casual and lazy style. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand *Removable adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper puller *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs 💡 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 💙💚

Size: 24CM~16CM~10CM

items.name_en: 🔥 New Woven Handle 🔥 The mini soft calfskin Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson 👜 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 🎀 This small size version is made of soft calfskin 🧸 paired with a unique woven handle. * This small Puzzle bag can hold, for example, a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 It can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, carried by hand, or held as a clutch 😻 Removable adjustable shoulder strap * Zipper closure 🖤 Calfskin zipper head 🔗 An external zippered back pocket and an internal slip pocket * Can be customized with the shoulder strap and personalized charms * Suede lining * Anagram embossing 🛍️

items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐

items.name_en: 🔥Bestseller🔥Small rattan and leather square Basket bag🌹This compact square Basket bag is handwoven from raffia and made of leather; simple and elegant🌼Lightweight, simple style with depth💥Korean style feel with this bag; perfect for travel and photos💄Adjustable strap length, great for outings or commuting👜Easy to match, looks refreshing👑The Square basket is an essential beach vacation bag🌷A casual bag is a must; this bag fits a water bottle⭐️And even a small umbrella.
